description.sourceText: Infuses the surrounding ground with energy, causing it to explode after a set amount of time.
Risks its life to cause a violent explosion. Becomes incapacitated afterwards.
Loupmoon's exclusive skill. Leaps forward and attacks twice with vicious claws imbued with dark energy.
Menasting's exclusive skill. Jumps high and forcefully stabs its prey with its tail. The poison from the tail is deadly.
Orserk's exclusive skill. Summons a spear of lightning while leaping into the air before throwing it at an enemy.
Kingpaca's exclusive skill. Leaps high into the air before smashing into an enemy with its chubby, massive body.
Herbil's exclusive skill. After a brief moment of preparation, charges at the enemy at high speed, finishing with a flip.
Starryon's exclusive skill. Confuses enemies with flickering steps and launches slashing attack with its sharp horn.
Charges electric energy before blasting enemies with a powerful shock.
Grizzbolt's exclusive skill. After leaping at an enemy and tearing at it twice with its electrically charged claws, it attacks the ground, sending an electric shock throughout the area.
Generates a lightning bolt that moves forward in a line.
Acts as a lightning rod, calling down thunderbolts that electrocute the surrounding area.
Takes aim at an enemy before firing a super high speed laser.
Ophydia's exclusive skill. Burrows into the ground and vanishes. It then emerges at the surface as a flower bud, blooms, and unleashes a wide-area attack.
Moldron's exclusive skill. Spits a mass of magma from its mouth. The impact creates magma pools that damage enemies on contact.
Blazamut Ryu's exclusive skill. After a big jump, moves at high speed in the air, gathering strength to unleash a powerful punch.
Risks life to cause a massive explosion. Those who perish for their duty become glistening stars in the night sky.
Selyne's exclusive skill. Stores energy in the moon on its back, then fires a crescent-shaped beam forward.
The user fires three high-speed blades of wind in quick succession that fly straight at enemies.
Gildra's exclusive skill. Extends bandages from its hands to deliver a series of attacks.
Broncherry's exclusive skill. Turns sideways before tackling enemies in front of it, sending them flying into the air.
Elphidran's exclusive skill. Generates twin whirlwinds imbued with a mysterious power that pursues enemies.
Creates a giant ball of darkness and hurls it at an enemy.
Bellanoir Libero's exclusive skill. Disappears suddenly, then reappears while firing a barrage of beams. The beams spread like a beautiful flower in bloom.
Bellanoir's exclusive skill. Disappears suddenly, then reappears while firing a barrage of beams.
Xenolord's exclusive skill. Summons the light of destruction from subspace and continuously fires it in all directions, burning everything in its sight to ashes.
Charges destructive energy before firing a high-powered beam forward across a wide area.
Pupperai's exclusive skill. Charges at full speed, delivering two consecutive slashes with the wooden stick held in its mouth.
Cawgnito's exclusive skill. Teleports next to an enemy before attacking with its beak.
Faleris' exclusive skill. After creating scorching tornadoes, it cloaks itself in hellfire and charges forward.
Faleris Aqua's exclusive skill. After summoning a massive tornado, it envelops its body in water and charges forward.
Creates two balls of electric energy that fire numerous lightning orbs at enemies.
Hurls poison sludge at an enemy.
Generates a fog of poison in front, causing the opponent to become poisoned.
Dandilord's exclusive skill. Charges forward while sliding along the ground, spraying corrosive mist. The mist remains in the area for a limited time.
Focuses energy into the body and scatters poison orbs in all directions.
Charges a massive amount of energy before firing a large destructive ball.
Charges energy into a focused blast.
Cattiva's exclusive skill. Chases after enemies, swinging both arms and delivering a flurry of punches.
Hartalis' exclusive skill. Leaps high into the air, condensing immense energy into a descending sphere of light. When it strikes the ground, it purifies all on the ground below.
Unleashes a sphere of light that slowly tracks down an enemy. As it nears its target, it splits into countless light bullets that strike all at once.
Shoots countless wind swords that fly straight towards the enemy.
Leafan's exclusive skill. Rapidly delivers a series of consecutive roundhouse kicks, finishing with an engery blast.
Rushoar's exclusive skill. Takes aim at a foe and rushes at them with a fierce charge.
Launches a blade of wind that rebounds off enemies or trees, striking repeatedly. Can ricochet up to four times.
Generates a sharp rock spear under an enemy.
Causes the ground to shake before hurling a massive stone mass at its surroundings.
Dualiths exclusive skill. Detaches its left arm to sweep enemies, then launches its right arm.
Chillet's exclusive skill. Gathers a bit of strength and leaps forward. Always shuts its eyes tight in fear when landing.
Shakes the ground and lifts a massive boulder into the air.
Lamball's exclusive skill. Curls into a ball, rolling after any enemies in its way. Becomes dizzy and unable to move after the attack ends.
Hartalis' exclusive skill. Fades from sight, then calls down a massive barrage of light pillars centered on its position.
Generates two sand tornadoes on either side before launching them at an enemy.
Creates multiple sand tornadoes. The tornadoes continuously spin in circles.
Xenolord's exclusive skill. Generates four satellite-like wings with auto-attack functionality. These wings will automatically track and attack the enemy when the next attack is launched.
Fires a volley of hard seeds at enemies in front of it.
Launches a deadly seed. If it hits an enemy, the seed explodes.
Selyne's exclusive skill. Fires two consecutive high-speed blades imbued with the power of moonlight.
Quickly discharges dark energy, damaging those around it.

Snock's exclusive skill. Withdraws into its shell to reduce damage taken while building electric charge. Once fully charged, it discharges, damaging nearby enemies. After discharging, the Attack of this Pal's Electric skills is increased for a limited time.
Digtoise's exclusive skill. Moves while spinning its whole body at high speed. Drills through enemies, dealing continuous damage.
Quickly discharges electricity, shocking those around it.
Starryon Primo's exclusive skill. Cloaks the body in radiant flames and charges toward the enemy.
Gloopie's exclusive skill. Releases smoke to conceal itself, then launches a surprise headbutt from the shadows.
Loupmoon Cryst's exclusive skill. Leaps forward and attacks twice with vicious claws imbued with ice element.
Elgrove Cryst's exclusive skill. Enters a wild frenzy and unleashes two consecutive Ice-element charge attacks.
Charges solar energy before blasting enemies with a powerful beam.
Releases lightning orbs in a fan shape, spreading as they travel.
Paladius' exclusive skill. Charges forward while enveloped in holy power with its spear thrust ahead. The shield in its other hand blocks all attacks during the charge.
Generates spiny thorns that chase an enemy along the ground, piercing them from below.
Anubis' exclusive skill. Performs a spin kick with its strong legs, sweeping enemies over a wide area.
Elizabee's exclusive skill. Channels power into its staff, and unleashes it in a whirl.
Shoots fireballs towards an enemy. The fireballs explode after a short distance, generating smaller fireballs that spread forward.
Fires three balls of malice that relentlessly pursue an enemy.
Generates a column of water that travels in a straight line.
Generates stars around the enemy that explode on contact. Stars also explode after some time.
Fires a barrage of stones forward.
Digs up a boulder and hurls it at an enemy.

Cryolinx Terra's exclusive skill. First, it strikes with its claws, followed by a second slash, and culminates with a powerful slash using its entire body. When swinging the claws, rocks are launched forward in a fan shape.
Bulldosu's exclusive skill. Raises its right hind leg high and stomps the ground, creating a shockwave that strikes enemies in a fan-shaped area ahead.
Eidrolon's exclusive skill. Closes in on the enemy at high speed to deliver a cleaving swipe with its tail.
Calls lightning that strikes an enemy after a set amount of time has passed.
Fires a high-speed lightning spear straight ahead towards the enemy.
Charges forward while manipulating the atmosphere and enveloping itself in thunderclouds.
Prixter Lux's exclusive skill. Uses superconductivity to closes the distance to the enemy at high speed, then swings its pincers upward with full force.
Penking Lux's exclusive skill. Lies on its belly while generating electric charge all around it before sliding at enemies at high speed.
Generates a huge tornado of lightning that moves slowly towards the enemy.
Nitewing's exclusive skill. Generates a tornado ahead before soaring towards its target.
Fires a high-pressure stream of water forward. After a short delay, the stream branches off to the left and right.
Generates lightning that strikes an enemy three times from above.
A high-speed lightning ball that flies in a straight line. Simultaneously fires slow lightning balls that track the enemy.
Finsider's exclusive skill. Draws twin water blasters from its mouth, firing six shots alternately left and right, then finishes by combining both blasters to unleash one powerful shot.
Necromus' exclusive skill. Clads its twin spears with vicious whirlwinds and charges forward, thrusting them one after the other.
Fires high-speed dark orbs in a fan shape, spreading as they travel.
Prixter's exclusive skill. Closes the distance to the enemy at high speed, then swings its pincers upward with full force.
Reptyro's exclusive skill. Raises its front legs and slams them into the ground, causing a volcanic eruptions under its enemies. It simultaneously bombards them with volcanic bombs from above.
Fires countless volcanic bombs into the sky. After a while, the bombs rain down around their originator.
Dogen's exclusive skill. Adopts an aiki stance. While in this stance, nulify any incoming attack, instantly close in on the enemy, and counter with a full-forced palm strike.
Summons a massive wind vortex around itself and unleashes a powerful attack.
Fires a high speed blade of wind that flies straight at an enemy.
Launches sharp blades of air that fan out.
Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take 60% less damage from explosive attacks, and are immune to Stun. (Does not stack)
While at a base, increases the Watering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)
When activated, Anubis changes the player's attack type to Ground and increases Attack by 30%. Occasionally evades attacks with a flash sidestep during battle.
Can be ridden. While in party, the player gains Cold Resistance +2. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden as a flying mount. Increases the damage dealt to ores by 1100%, and you can obtain 1500% more Ore while mounted.
Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Water and increases Attack by 1%.
Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ice and increases Attack by 1%.
While in party, attacking enemies afflicted with Poison reduces their Attack by 40%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While mounted, delivers crushing blows with a hammer forged from Ice.

Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack by 13%. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by 5% for each other Electric Pal in your party. (Excluding Beakon)

Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Ice and increases Attack by 13%. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by 5% for each other Ice Pal in your party. (Excluding Beakon Cryst)
While in party, increases Elizabee's Attack. Sometimes drops Honey when assigned to Ranch.
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Nightmare Ray. When this Pal uses Nightmare Ray, it has a x1.1/1.3/1.6/2/2.5 damage multiplier.
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Nightmare Bloom. When this Pal uses Nightmare Bloom, it has a x1.1/1.3/1.6/2/2.5 damage multiplier.
Can be ridden. While in party, increases the Attack and Defense of the Pal fighting alongside you by 5% whenever you defeat an enemy. This effect lasts 20 seconds and stacks up to five times.
Can be ridden. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Dragon damage to enemy weak points by 25%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, Grass Pals drop 40% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, Neutral Pals drop 40% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in your base, increases the egg production speed of Pals assigned to Breeding Farm by 20%. (Does not stack)
While in party, increases Attack of Grass Pals by 15%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, Pal Eggs you pick up have a 35% chance of becoming an Alpha Pal Egg. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, Pal Eggs you pick up have a 45% chance of becoming an Alpha Pal Egg. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take 15% less Electric damage and are immune to Electrify. (Does not stack)
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Iaigiri. When this Pal uses Iaigiri, it has a x1.1/1.3/1.6/2/2.5 damage multiplier.

When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Iaigiri. When this Pal uses Iaigiri, it has a x1.1/1.3/1.6/2/2.5 damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by 30% but only when not in combat. (Does not stack)
Sometimes drops Red Berries from its back when assigned to Ranch. While in party, restores 100 Pal’s Hunger to the Pal with the lowest Hunger every 5 minutes. (Does not stack)
Sometimes drops Venom Gland from its back when assigned to Ranch. While in party, restores 100 Pal’s Hunger to the Pal with the lowest Hunger every 5 minutes. (Does not stack)
While in party, when the player performs a dodge roll or dodge step, Carnibora creates a whirlwind that deals damage to enemies it touches (Grass / Power: 40). (Does not stack)
While in party, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity by 100. (Does not stack)
When activated, grants Night Vision to see in dark places. Activate again to turn off. Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to Ranch.
While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.
While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.
Can be ridden. While in party, the Pal fighting alongside you gradually loses Health in exchange for 40% Attack increase. (Does not stack)
Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.
Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Dragon and increases Attack by 1%.
Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Fire and increases Attack by 1%.
When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Poison Fog. While at a base, increases the Farming Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)
While at a base, increases the Gathering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)
While in party, increases Attack of Neutral Pals by 15%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While airborne before landing, the player's Attack is increased by 50%.

When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Dark damage to enemy weak points by 25%. (Does not stack)
While in party, Dragon Pals drop 40% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)
While in party, when attacking enemy weak point, increases the power of the next weak point attack by 30%. (Does not stack)
While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with Dark magic bullets. These bullets will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

When activated, the player's attacks inflict Poison 2. While in party, grants the player and party Pals immunity to Poison, and nullifies the effects of toxic gas in the World Tree area. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by 50% while mounted on sand.
While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with Electric bolts. These bolts will not reduce the target's Health below 1.
While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with Dark bolts. These bolts will not reduce the target's Health below 1.
When activated, Depresso chugs an entire energy drink, increasing its Movement Speed and Work Speed by 100%. Sometimes drops Venom Gland when assigned to Ranch.
